Package org.eventb.core.basis

Class PSStatus

java.lang.Object
org.eclipse.core.runtime.PlatformObject
org.rodinp.core.basis.RodinElement
org.rodinp.core.basis.InternalElement
org.eventb.core.basis.EventBProofElement
org.eventb.core.basis.PSStatus
All Implemented Interfaces:
org.eclipse.core.runtime.IAdaptable, IPOStampedElement, IPRProofInfoElement, IPSStatus, IElementManipulation, IInternalElement, IParent, IRodinElement, ISnapshotable
public class PSStatus extends EventBProofElement implements IPSStatus
Implementation of Event-B proof obligation status as an extension of the Rodin database.

This class is intended to be implemented by clients that want to extend this internal element type.

This class should not be used in any other way than subclassing it in a database extension. In particular, clients should not use it, but rather use its associated interface IPSStatus.

Since:
1.0

      This is a handle-only method.

    • getProof

      public IPRProof getProof()
      Description copied from interface: IPSStatus
      Returns the proof associated to this proof obligation from the RODIN database.

      This is a handle-only method. The proof element may or may not be present.

      Specified by:
      getProof in interface IPSStatus
      Returns:
      the proof associated to this status element

    • isBroken

      public boolean isBroken() throws RodinDBException
      Description copied from interface: IPSStatus
      Returns whether this proof obligation has a broken proof, that is a proof that does not match its sequent, and thus can't be used to discharge the proof obligation.

      The returned value is true iff the corresponding attribute contains true. Hence, if the attribute is absent, false is returned.

      Specified by:
      isBroken in interface IPSStatus
      Returns:
      true if the associated proof is broken
      Throws:
      RodinDBException
      See Also:
      • IPSStatus.setBroken(boolean, IProgressMonitor)

    • setBroken

      public void setBroken(boolean value, org.eclipse.core.runtime.IProgressMonitor monitor) throws RodinDBException
      Description copied from interface: IPSStatus
      Sets whether this proof obligation has a broken proof.
      Specified by:
      setBroken in interface IPSStatus
      Parameters:
      value - The value to set to
      monitor - a progress monitor, or null if progress reporting is not desired
      Throws:
      RodinDBException
      See Also:
      • IPSStatus.isBroken()

    • copyProofInfo

      public void copyProofInfo(org.eclipse.core.runtime.IProgressMonitor monitor) throws RodinDBException
      Description copied from interface: IPSStatus
      Copies the cached proof information attributes described in IPRProofInfoElement from the associated proof in case it exists.

      In case the associated proof does not exist, all proof information attributes are removed.

      Specified by:
      copyProofInfo in interface IPSStatus
      Parameters:
      monitor - a progress monitor, or null if progress reporting is not desired
      Throws:
      RodinDBException
      See Also:
      • IPRProofInfoElement

    • getPOSequent

      public IPOSequent getPOSequent()
      Description copied from interface: IPSStatus
      Returns the proof obligation associated to this status element from the RODIN database.

      This is a handle-only method. The returned element may or may not be present.

      Specified by:
      getPOSequent in interface IPSStatus
      Returns:
      the sequent associated to this proof obligation
